orchestrator_authority: The orchestrator remains in charge; this packet recommends the next mathematical move.
current_gap: GAP1 (Kelley–Lyu transfer): r_3(N) ≤ N·exp(-c(log N)^{1/2}). Key barrier: ℓ¹ vs ℓ² spectral normalization of 1_A in Croot–Sisask lemma. Explorer finding: |Spec_δ(1_A)| = O(α^{-1}) relative to ℓ¹ norm, vs O(α^{-2}) relative to ℓ² norm — if ℓ¹ suffices for density increment, exponent 1/3 follows immediately. GAP2 (doubly-iterated Raghavan): r_3(N) ≤ N·exp(-c(log N)^{1/3}) via m=4 sifting. GAP5 (WIT sorry closing): 4/12 steps done; steps 6, 8, 5 tractable.
reason: Explorer complete. Top barriers identified (BL1-GRID: ℓ¹ almost-periodicity question; BL3-QCS: Quadratic Croot–Sisask for k=4). Lovász needed for structural analysis before Generator can execute. In parallel: Generator should close WIT steps 6 (rk_le_N), 8 (rk_pos), 5 (rk_three_eq_rothNumberNat).
evaluator: Lovász success: (A) proof that ℓ¹ normalization of 1_A gives rank O(α^{-1}) in density increment → exponent 1/3 for r_3(N), OR (B) van der Corput gives r_4(N) ≤ N·exp(-(log N)^{1/12}) from Raghavan; Generator success: 3 new sorry-free steps in lean/RkN.lean
